provenance.method: Travel/discovery pages were used only to discover leads. Every retained record has separate operator/city/institution evidence and an OpenStreetMap/Nominatim identity/coordinate source. Web research does not establish current safe conditions.
provenance.lead_policy: Discovery lead only; no article prose, ranking, riddle, image, or proprietary description copied.
provenance.robots_terms_note: No paywall bypass, authenticated/private API, article scraping, or image copying was used. Atlas pages that denied automated access were not circumvented.

scope.launch_priority_interpretation: Launch and launch-adjacent records prioritize SoHo/Tribeca, East Village, Greenwich Village, Chinatown, and Lower East Side; other boroughs are explicitly tagged borough-expansion.
